scope.summary: RC mutation-seal work is closed as an advisory/background precondition proof: no release gate is tightened, tooling is ready, and the seal remains non-blocking for publish.
out_of_scope: No fresh five-surface mutation campaign was run or sealed.
No release, publish, CI, pre-push, or coverage gate was changed to fail on the missing seal.
No docs/plan or bead-title rename work is included; pane 2 owns the repo-wide train rename.

entry_points.name: RC mutation seal precondition artifact
entry_points.trace: tests/artifacts/evidence/rc-mutation-seal-precondition-check.json records status=blocked for the campaign preconditions, advisory_contract.must_not_block_publish=true, release_gate_changes_made=false, and bead_updates_made=false at source 7ce64039b1beb25ed77b7a68f3de3d8075a2ef3e.

entry_points.name: RC tag precondition
entry_points.trace: `git tag -l '*0.9.1*' '*0.10*' '*0.11*' '*rc*' | sort` returned no matches, so no RC-era source exists for an exact-SHA mutation seal.

entry_points.name: Safety-surface churn precondition
entry_points.trace: The artifact records 103 commits touching guard/audit/core/db/dispatch in the prior 24h, one safety-surface commit after fuzz shard abe65e48, and zero safety-surface commits after R-fail close 989b68ca.

entry_points.name: Seal tooling readiness
entry_points.trace: `scripts/swarm_discipline.sh bounded-run --timeout 180 -- bash scripts/mutation_safety_gate.sh self-test` passed; `python3 -m py_compile scripts/migrate_mutation_result.py scripts/test_migrate_mutation_result.py` passed; `python3 scripts/migrate_mutation_result.py --help` loaded the verifier/converter CLI.

entry_points.name: No committed campaign artifact
entry_points.trace: `find tests/artifacts -maxdepth 4 -iname '*mutation*' -o -iname '*seal*'` found no fresh five-surface mutation/seal artifacts for this RC-seal bead.

limitations: This close does not claim a fresh mutation seal exists; it records the operator-directed advisory/no-stall disposition and the current precondition blocker.

The campaign should only run later as background work when an RC-era SHA exists and safety-crate churn has settled; its result must still pass through scripts/migrate_mutation_result.py with complete OOM-free shard outputs and integrity sidecars.
The seal is a test-quality measurement, not a runtime-safety gate; fuzz lanes remain the robustness gate.
follow_ups: When the operator asks for the background campaign, produce a fresh five-surface seal for the exact RC-era SHA without making publish wait on it.
